_meta.name: background_sdxl
_meta.stage: Emberwake battle backgrounds (HD-2D backdrops behind battle sprites). SDXL base 1.0 ALONE — NO pixel-art-xl LoRA — 1344x768 painterly generation -> deterministic bg_post_chain.py -> opaque 640x360 (game internal res).
_meta.model_choice: SDXL base alone, painterly (no pixel LoRA). Rationale: a battle background RECEDES behind 128-224px pixel monster sprites; the HD-2D aesthetic (style-bible: 640x360 internal, nearest upscale) deliberately pairs painterly/atmospheric backdrops with pixel foreground sprites (Octopath model). pixel-art-xl flattens depth into blocky bands that fight the receding-cavern brief and read as noise at 640x360; SDXL alone gives the ember-glow gradient, aerial-perspective depth, and soft cool shadows the brief asks for. Opacity is intrinsic (no alpha channel from VAEDecode) so the battle_background gate (fill>=0.95) is met by construction.
_meta.post_chain: skills/m8-atelier/assets/workflows/bg_post_chain.py: center-crop to 16:9 -> LANCZOS downscale to 640x360 -> flatten to opaque RGBA (alpha=255) -> optional mediancut quantize (--quant, default off; backgrounds gate allows unlimited colors, a light 192-color pass harmonizes with the pixel palette without banding the ember gradient).
